title: Will Iran’s New Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, Attend His Father’s Funeral?
summary_full: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since March, after his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was killed in an Israeli strike.
summary_public: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since March, after his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was killed in an Israeli strike.
